With the introduction of these latest offerings from Meta, IBM now supports a total of 13 Meta models in the expansive library of \u00a0foundation models available in watsonx.ai. Trained on 40 trillion tokens of data, Llama 4 Scout offers performance rivalling or exceeding that of models with significantly larger active parameter counts while keeping costs and latency low. ## Llama 4 models on IBM watsonx. Developers and businesses can select their preferred Llama 4 model from the extensive catalog of foundation models on IBM watsonx.ai, then fine-tune, distill and deploy it across cloud, on-premises, or edge environments of their choice.
